label: My Work
title: Featured
description: A collection of applications I've built, showcasing my journey from automation testing to full-stack development.

projects.title: AI Personal Finance App
projects.description: Comprehensive personal finance management with AI-powered expense categorization, intelligent budgeting, receipt scanning, and financial health reports.

projects.title: Gas Booking System
projects.description: Full-stack application for gas cylinder booking with real-time inventory, payment integration, and delivery tracking.

projects.title: Authentication System
projects.description: Secure authentication system with JWT, email verification, password reset, and role-based access control.

projects.title: Notes/Blog App
projects.description: Feature-rich notes application with rich text editor, categories, search, and cloud synchronization.

projects.title: Invoice Generator
projects.description: Generate, manage, and download invoices as PDF with email notifications and full invoice lifecycle management.

projects.title: Playwright E2E Framework
projects.description: Production-ready E2E automation framework built with Playwright, Cucumber BDD, and TypeScript including CI/CD integration.
